en_title: New Fumito Ueda Game Gets Official Title, gen Atlas — No Release Date or Window Given
cn_title: 上田文人新作正式定名《gen ATLAS》
subtitle: 经典配方，再续前缘
opus_summary: 上田文人新作正式定名《gen ATLAS》，为单人开放世界动作冒险，登陆PS5、Xbox Series和PC，非PlayStation独占。

paragraphs.en: Legendary video game developer Fumito Ueda has revealed the official title of his upcoming game, gen ATLAS, at Summer Game Fest alongside a new trailer.
paragraphs.cn: 传奇游戏制作人上田文人在夏日游戏节上公布了其新作的正式名称《gen ATLAS》，并同步放出了一段全新预告片。

paragraphs.en: Formerly known as “Project Robot”, it’s the first game from the Ico, Shadow of the Colossus, and The Last Guardian creator’s new studio, genDESIGN. Described as a “single-player, open-world, action-adventure”, it will be coming to PS5, Xbox Series X & S, and PC via the Epic Store.
paragraphs.cn: 这款游戏此前代号为「Project Robot」，是《ICO》《旺达与巨像》《最后的守护者》创作者新工作室 genDESIGN 的首部作品。官方将其描述为一款「单人、开放世界、动作冒险」游戏，将登陆 PS5、Xbox Series X|S 以及 PC（Epic 商店）。

paragraphs.en: It will mark the first time a Ueda game has not been exclusive to PlayStation, after he left Sony during the completion of The Last Guardian and the subsequent closure of Japan Studio years later.
paragraphs.cn: 这将是上田文人的游戏首次不再由 PlayStation 独占。此前他在《最后的守护者》开发期间离开了索尼，随后几年日本工作室也宣告关闭。

paragraphs.en: Further details are given regarding its setting, which definitely makes gen ATLAS sound similar in tone and theme to the developer’s previous works. “Without knowing why, you awaken on an abandoned planet,” a press release reads.
paragraphs.cn: 官方还透露了更多关于游戏背景设定的细节，这无疑让《gen ATLAS》在基调与主题上听起来与开发者之前的作品颇为相似。新闻稿中写道：「你在一颗被遗弃的星球上醒来，不知为何。」

paragraphs.en: “Before you lies a vast, silent world. Colossal structures stretch over endless plains, deserted facilities, and an ever-changing sea. The remnants of some grand design litter the planet’s surface. As you journey deeper into this strange world, a colossal robot awaits. Its overwhelming power opens paths to places once beyond reach, transforming your conception of the world. Across an endless expanse of time, the remnants of those forgotten constructs begin to move once more…”
paragraphs.cn: 「你面前是一个广阔而寂静的世界。巨大的建筑延伸至无尽的平原、废弃的设施和一片变幻莫测的海洋。某种宏大设计的残骸散落在星球表面。当你深入这个奇异世界时，一个巨大的机器人正在等待。它压倒性的力量开辟了通往曾经无法触及之处的道路，改变了你对世界的认知。在无尽的时间长河中，那些被遗忘的构造的残骸开始再次移动……」

paragraphs.en: A small human accompanying a giant creature on a journey, you say? It certainly sounds like a Fumito Ueda game. “The team and I are grateful to all the fans who’ve been eager to learn more about our game,” says Ueda. “Their passion and enthusiasm has always motivated and inspired us. We hope to share an experience that inspires moments of quiet wonder and discovery.”
paragraphs.cn: 一个小小的人类陪伴着一个巨大生物踏上旅程？这听起来确实像上田文人的游戏。上田表示：「我和团队感谢所有渴望了解更多游戏信息的粉丝。他们的热情和激情一直激励着我们。我们希望分享一种能激发安静惊叹与发现时刻的体验。」

paragraphs.en: No release date or window has been given for gen ATLAS as of yet. Those who eagerly awaited his previous game, The Last Guardian, will be familiar with this scenario, as the PS4 exclusive famously took nine years to make, as it disappeared and reappeared over the course of its long development. It has already been a decade since its release, so let’s hope it isn’t too much longer until we have another Ueda game in our hands again.
paragraphs.cn: 目前《gen ATLAS》尚未公布任何发售日期或窗口。那些曾热切期待他上一款游戏《最后的守护者》的玩家对此应该很熟悉——这款PS4独占作品耗时九年才制作完成，在漫长的开发过程中几度消失又重现。如今距离该作发售已过去十年，希望我们不用再等太久就能再次玩到上田文人的新作。

pending_dict.reason: 官方正式名称，保留英文
